title: clinopodium subnudum
intro: Clinopodium subnudum, also known as woolly bergamot or narrow-leaf mountain mint, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Clinopodium subnudum include its ability to reduce nausea and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Clinopodium subnudum are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
